question: What is the location of the woman in this image? Select from the following options: (A) In the center of the frame. (B) Not present in the image. (C) To the right of the frame. (D) In the background.
gold_answer: To the right of the frame
answer_choices: In the center of the frame
To the right of the frame

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A woman standing clearly in the foreground, wearing a light-colored top, facing forward.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: No woman, or only partial/obscured figures, or figures in the background.
